name: Homemade Marinara Sauce
recipeIngredient: 3 cans whole peeled Italian plum tomatoes (28 ounces each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
2. Add the onions and cook for 5 minutes or until translucent.
3. Add the garlic and cook for another minute.
4. Pour in the plum tomatoes, stirring to combine everything.
5. Add the oregano, basil, sugar, salt, and pepper; stir well to mix all ingredients evenly.
6. Bring the mixture to a simmer and let it cook for 25-30 minutes.
7. Remove from heat and allow the sauce to cool for 15 minutes before serving.
Yield: 6 cups
